home.aboutText: {years} years in B2B product design, specializing in Enterprise SaaS & AI product experience — from business insight and product strategy to interaction design and design system infrastructure.
home.letsTalkSub: Currently available for Senior Product Designer / AI Product Designer opportunities.

about.heading: About
about.intro: {years} years in B2B SaaS product design, currently focused on AI product experience. My background spans enterprise low-code platforms and cross-border e-commerce SaaS — full-cycle design capability from complex systems to global products.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subtitle: Currently available for {roles} opportunities.
contact.resumeText: Detailed work history, quantified results, and full case context.

resume.strengthSummary: 6-year B2B/SaaS product design expert, proficient in driving business growth with AI. Led full-cycle strategy and design system construction for complex, global products.

profileData.title: AI-Native Product Designer
profileData.subtitle: B2B AI Product Designer
profileData.tagline: Integrating AI capabilities, complex business systems, and commercial goals into scalable, measurable product experiences.

narrative.label: Complex Systems Design
narrative.story: At an enterprise software company, started with a low-code platform and learned to abstract complex enterprise workflows into usable product experiences.

narrative.label: AI Product Design
narrative.story: At a cross-border e-commerce SaaS company, embedded generative AI into the product, closing the loop from AI capability abstraction to business outcomes.

narrative.label: System Builder
narrative.story: Beyond individual AI features — building AI experience measurement systems, semantic design systems, and cross-team collaboration mechanisms.

profileData.workingStyleSummary: Product-thinking driven, not visual-driven. Strategic thinking, not pure execution. Transforming complex AI capabilities into measurable, scalable product experience systems.

highlights: Led Shopify Sidekick AI capability integration & experience upgrade
Built design system and international design standards
Drove product transformation from process tools to intelligent growth platform
Drove AI product capability scaled deployment

homeCapabilities.description: Specialized in complex B2B system design with 6+ years of enterprise product experience.

homeCapabilities.description: Transform generative AI capabilities into understandable, measurable, and scalable product experiences.

profileData.coreValue: My value lies in transforming complex AI capabilities into understandable, measurable, and scalable product experience systems — not in producing beautiful interfaces.

resumeData.strengthSummary: 6-year B2B/SaaS product design expert, proficient in driving business growth with AI. Led full-cycle strategy and design system construction for complex, global products.

strengths.title: Business-Led & Growth-Outcome Oriented
strengths.desc: 6 years of B2B/SaaS full-cycle experience, deeply understanding business models and growth levers. Particularly in cross-border e-commerce and the Shopify ecosystem, successfully led AI-driven growth strategies (e.g., Shopify Sidekick), linking design goals directly to business KPIs (conversion rate, efficiency, GMV) to drive closed-loop growth from experience optimization to business impact.

strengths.title: Data-Driven & AI-Empowered Decision Making
strengths.desc: Proficient in user research, adept at deeply integrating AI tools like ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini and Shopify Sidekick into insight and decision workflows. High data sensitivity — capable of building multi-layered measurement systems covering AI output quality, user behavior, and business results.

strengths.title: Design System Governance & Asset Building
strengths.desc: Led Design System construction and cross-platform implementation, with full support for AI generation logic and international expansion. Through component abstraction and specification accumulation, drove team transformation from 'people-driven' to 'system-driven'.

strengths.title: Full-Cycle Experience Design & Delivery
strengths.desc: Full-cycle capability from business insight to high-fidelity delivery. Skilled at abstracting complex AI capabilities (e.g., Shopify Sidekick) into intuitive, efficient merchant workflows, collaborating deeply with product and engineering teams.

experience.summary: Led full-cycle experience design for a Shopify merchant cross-border e-commerce marketing SaaS platform. Systematically embedded Shopify Sidekick's generative AI, strategic suggestions, and automation capabilities into key growth workflows — advertising creative, product optimization, and store operations.

achievements.title: AI-Driven Efficiency & Cost Optimization (Efficiency + ROI + Sidekick)
achievements.desc: Leveraging Shopify Sidekick's generative capabilities and smart suggestion mechanisms, led the ad creative automation project: creative preparation efficiency improved 25% (AI contributed ~60%), per-asset production cycle reduced by ~4 hours.

achievements.title: Global Design Driving Revenue Growth (International + GMV)
achievements.desc: Led high-conversion Shopify template system with cross-cultural validation and multi-market data: first-purchase conversion rate ↑8%, driving early GMV growth in North America and Southeast Asia.

achievements.title: Experience Infrastructure Empowering Organizational Collaboration (DesignOps + Multi-language)
achievements.desc: Built company-level B2B design system from scratch with full AI generation support: 70% component reuse rate, international iteration cycle reduced by 30%.

responsibilities: Abstracted Shopify Sidekick's three core AI capabilities (content generation, strategic suggestions, automation) into a reusable AI capability model, systematically embedded into ad creation, product optimization, and workflow automation.
Built a design & AI experience assessment system with cross-tier metrics monitoring Sidekick's real business contribution: AI quality layer, experience behavior layer, continuous optimization loop.
Led construction and governance of a multi-language, multi-market B2B design system fully compatible with AI-generated interfaces, text variants, and layout automation.

experience.company: Shanghai Boke Information Technology Co., Ltd.
experience.summary: Led intelligent experience strategy, AI capability planning, and end-to-end delivery for the company's core low-code platform. Using generative AI, semantic models, and data systems as foundations, abstracted complex enterprise configurations into scalable, reusable platform capabilities.

achievements.title: AI-Driven Build Efficiency (Core Business KPI)
achievements.desc: Introduced generative AI and behavioral intent recognition, reconstructing the 'page build → component selection → logic configuration' pipeline: build efficiency ↑30–45%, smart template hit rate 70%+, NPS/CSAT ↑10–15%.

achievements.title: Built Platform-Level Intelligent Experience System (Design × AI Scorecard)
achievements.desc: Established AI capability inventory, metrics system (Precision, Coverage, Confidence) and explainability rules linked to business KPIs: critical task completion rate ↑15%+, user error rate ↓20%.

achievements.title: Intelligent Design System (AI Generation × Component Architecture)
achievements.desc: Upgraded design system to a bidirectional semantic system ('AI-generatable / AI-understandable') covering 60+ components: AI-generated UI accuracy ↑25–30%, design-dev consistency ↑30%.

achievements.title: Cross-Team AI Strategy Execution (PM × FE × AI Lab)
achievements.desc: Led platform-level AI experience strategy and interaction pattern baselines, built AI safety and feedback mechanisms: overall cross-team collaboration efficiency ↑20–25%.
